channel.title: VOLIK AUTOMOTIVE
channel.description: Premium Paint Protection Films and advanced automotive care solutions.

item.title: VOLIK AUTOMOTIVE - Premium PPF Specialist
item.description: The Ultimate Shield for Your Asset. Global distributor of high-performance Paint Protection Films.

item.title: VOLIK Technology - Graphene & Self-Healing
item.description: Explore our advanced Graphene Coating and Heat-Activated Self-Healing technology.

item.title: VOLIK Products - PPF Series
item.description: Discover the VOLIK series: V-SHIELD, V-GLOSS, and more premium protection solutions.
